name: Farmhouse Asparagus Pie (Great for Brunch)
recipeIngredient: 20 fresh asparagus spears -- cooked, or 1 (10 oz.) package of frozen asparagus spears -- cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the cooked asparagus in the bottom of the pie shell in a spoke fashion.
2. Top with chicken.
3. Cook and drain the bacon, then crumble it.
4. Scatter the crumbled bacon and Swiss cheese over the asparagus and chicken.
5. Beat together eggs, flour, salt, and cream; pour over the filling.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and paprika.
7. Bake in a moderate oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes, or until the pie filling is set. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting.
